content.en:
Countless True Monarchs gathered outside the Boundary Source Realm, staring at the Boundary Source Realm one by one.

From the outside, the Realm of Origin is similar to the ordinary world, only relatively large, but if you look closely, you can sense the aura of countless innate origin things contained inside the Realm of Origin Realm.

It is from this point that it can be judged that this world is the realm of the Realm.

The True Monarchs who came this time were not all the True Monarchs of the Quasi-Dao Realm, only about thirty percent of them came, after all, most of the True Monarchs were very desperate for their lives.

In the case of almost unlimited lifespan, naturally he will not risk entering the realm of the source of the realm, after all, if he enters the realm of the source of the realm at the beginning, the fight will definitely be frequent, and if the strength is not enough, the weak true monarch will die if he enters.

And in the quasi-Dao realm, the true monarchs who really occupy the majority of the number are those who are slightly weaker.

These true monarchs have a full understanding of their own strength and will not rush to death.

And there are very few true monarchs like Ye Tian who are still in the early stage of the True Spirit Realm, and they have only stepped into the True Spirit Realm not long ago, and they dare to enter the Realm Source Realm.

Ye Tian glanced over, most of the True Monarch's cultivation was above the late stage of the True Spirit Realm, and more than seventy percent of them were at the peak of the True Spirit Realm.

And his cultivation in the early stage of the True Spirit Realm was really dazzling here, attracting the attention of many people, even some hostile glances.

As the Dao Ancestor of the Void Heaven lineage, and his potential is huge, if other big forces have the opportunity, they naturally want to kill him.

"I wonder if the realm of the source of the realm can be used as a world where the Great Realm moves and shuttles?"

Ye Tian guessed in his heart.

If he could, then he could easily leave the Realm of Origin or enter the Realm of Origin easily.

However, he felt unlikely.

Because the realm of the origin of the realm is not an ordinary world, his great realm shift can only shuttle through the ordinary world, which is also one of the limitations of the great realm shift, otherwise, the great realm shift will be too terrible.

Another few months passed.

On this day, the realm of the source of the realm was finally conceived, and the world barrier was completely formed.

"It's time to go in!"

A Ming Zhenjun shuttled in from the world barriers of the Boundary Source Realm, and the position where everyone shuttled in was different, so the position that appeared in the Boundary Source Realm was naturally different.

Often, the entry position is a few millimeters away, and there may be trillions of kilometers in the boundary of the boundary source.

Ye Tian also shuttled in from a location in an instant, and came to a certain mountain range in the realm of the Boundary Source Realm.

As soon as he came in, Ye Tian tried to use the Great Realm to move away, but found that he couldn't shuttle away.

Clearly, the Great Realm Shift has failed.

Ye Tian no longer paid attention to the Great Realm Shift, but focused on finding the innate origin of things.

"A lot of innate origin things!"

Ye Tian's divine sense swept away, and he was immediately shocked.

This mountain range may not seem to be big, but there is at least one innate origin thing on top of each mountain peak, and it is all a top-notch innate origin thing.

"Close!"

"Close!"

"Close!"

Ye Tian collected ten Innate Origin Objects as fast as he could, but when he wanted to continue to collect Innate Origin Things, he trembled and felt a terrible crisis.

"Let's go!"

Ye Tian did not hesitate to use the space-time transfer technique to shuttle away.

That's when it happened.

A figure appeared in this mountain range, it was a man in a green robe, a pair of pupils seemed to contain everything in the world.

If someone who knows him sees him, he will know where he came from.

Traceless True Monarch - Ye Traceless!

The Traceless True Monarch is very strong, and it is very close to the True Monarch List, because the last place on the True Monarch List is not much stronger than the Traceless True Monarch, if the Traceless True Monarch has improved slightly, then it can definitely enter the True Monarch List.

Of course, at his level, every bit of progress is extremely difficult.

The Traceless True Monarch came here, sensed Ye Tian's existence, and without saying a word, he directly killed him through the air.

Even if Ye Tian's space-time transfer technique left and instantly moved hundreds of millions of miles away, he was still hit by a wisp of finger strength of the Traceless True Monarch.

--------

Far away.

Ye Tian drilled out of the void, spitting blood from his mouth, and a big hole appeared in his chest, which was due to being pierced by the finger of the Traceless True Monarch.

He did not hesitate and continued to flee.

It seemed that the Traceless True Monarch did not pursue him, so Ye Tian easily escaped.

A small canyon without an innate origin, Ye Tian felt that it was safer and would not attract attention, so he rested here.

"That's the Traceless True Monarch who is infinitely close to the True Monarch List, the strength is really strong, I thought I was not far from the True Monarch List, it seems that I was thinking too much. "

Ye Tian muttered.

Of course, although the finger of the Traceless True Monarch hurt him, his injuries were under the True Body of the Origin Divine Power Blood River, and he quickly recovered.

"The Traceless True Monarch shouldn't have made a full attack, but even if he does it with all his strength, it won't be easy if he wants to kill me!

Ye Tian thought to himself.

There are only 3,000 True Monarchs on the True Monarch List, and not all of them will come this time, and the total number of people who are around or above the strength of the Traceless True Monarch is estimated to be five or six thousand.

And the True Monarch who entered could use 100 million as a unit, so many True Monarchs entered the realm of the Realm of Origin, the probability of him encountering a powerful True Monarch was not high, it was pure bad luck just now.

In the following days, Ye Tian was careful and careful.

In such a powerful world of the Boundary Source Realm, the Heaven and Earth are greatly suppressed, and the entire world is permeated with a powerful Origin Power, even the divine consciousness of the True Monarchs will be affected, and it is difficult to explore too large an area.

Otherwise, the battle in the Realm of Origin will be even more terrifying!

Time passed day by day, and every day a large number of True Monarchs fell, and there were also many True Monarchs who gained a lot.

But there are very few true monarchs who are really willing to leave the realm of the source of the realm, and they are almost invisible.

After all, you can find a lot of innate origin things casually, which is simply picking up money!

In this case, where are those true monarchs willing to leave!

this day.

Ye Tian came to a huge lake, and what made him ecstatic was that there were lotus flowers on top of this lake, these lotus flowers were golden red, exuding a strong innate origin aura, and they were all innate origin things.

"108 pieces of innate origin things, and all of them are top-level innate origin things, a big harvest!"

Ye Tian was excited.

In fact, not all of the innate origin things in the realm of the realm of the origin are top-level innate origin things, most of them are still high-level innate origin things, after all, the realm of the origin has just been born, and many innate origin things have only been born for a long time, and it takes a long time to grow into top-level innate origin things.

A top-level innate origin thing is worth at least 30 high-grade innate origin things, and you can imagine how precious the value of so many top-level innate origin things is.

Immediately, Ye Tian was about to go up and pick it.

But at this moment, three breaths came.

"Hahaha, 108 top-level innate origin things, it's time for our Three Rat True Monarchs to make a big gain!"

With the sound of wild laughter, three evil-looking men appeared in Ye Tian's perception.

"Three Rat True Monarchs?"

Ye Tian had never heard of this title, and coupled with the fact that the other party's aura was not very strong, he breathed a sigh of relief in his heart.

If there was a True Monarch who enjoyed fame, or a True Monarch as powerful as the Traceless True Monarch, he would definitely turn around and leave without saying a word.

But with a true monarch of the level of the Three Rats True Monarch, he is not afraid at all.

"A rookie in the early stage of a little True Spirit Realm dares to enter the realm of the Origin Realm, he is simply looking for death and killing him!"

One of the Three Rat True Monarchs, the Blood Rat True Monarch, said coldly.

He didn't recognize Ye Tian, this is also normal, the quasi-Dao realm is now hundreds of millions of true monarchs, if he doesn't deliberately understand, who knows Ye Tian!

You may have heard of it, but it's hard to recognize it if you haven't seen it.

Swish!

The three true monarchs killed Ye Tian, but it seemed that they were afraid of the 108 innate origin things, and they didn't dare to use a large-scale killing move, for fear of damaging these innate origin things.

Seeing that these three people wanted to kill him, Ye Tian naturally wouldn't leave his hands.

"Destroy the gods!"

Ye Tian unleashed this Divine Soul Origin Divine Power, striking with all his strength, covering the three True Monarchs at the same time
